Package org.mitre.synthea.world.agents

Class Clinician

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.agents.Clinician
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, QuadTreeElement
public class Clinician extends Object implements Serializable, QuadTreeElement
Represents a clinician, including their attributes, services provided, and organizational details.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

      Unique identifier for the clinician.

      public final String uuid
      Universally unique identifier (UUID) for the clinician.

      National Provider Identifier (NPI) for the clinician.

    • attributes

      public Map<String,Object> attributes
      Attributes of the clinician, such as name, gender, and specialty.

    • populationSeed

      public long populationSeed
      Seed for generating random values for the clinician.

  • Constructor Details

    • Clinician

      public Clinician(long clinicianSeed, RandomNumberGenerator clinicianRand, long identifier, Provider organization)
      Create a new clinician.
      Parameters:
      clinicianSeed - The seed for this clinician.
      clinicianRand - The random number generator to use for this clinician.
      identifier - The clinician's organizational unique identifier.
      organization - The organization this clinician belongs to. May be null.

  • Method Details

    • getResourceID

      public String getResourceID()
      Get the clinician's UUID.
      Returns:
      UUID as a string.

    • getOrganization

      public Provider getOrganization()
      Get the clinician's organization.
      Returns:
      The provider organization. May be null.

    • getFullname

      public String getFullname()
      Get the clinician's full name, including title (e.g., "Dr.").
      Returns:
      The full name as a string.

    • getAttributes

      public Map<String,Object> getAttributes()
      Get the clinician's attributes.
      Returns:
      A map of attributes.

    • hasService

      public boolean hasService(String service)
      Check if the clinician provides a specific service.
      Parameters:
      service - The service to check.
      Returns:
      True if the service is provided, false otherwise.

    • incrementEncounters

      public int incrementEncounters()
      Increment the number of encounters performed by this clinician.
      Returns:
      The incremented number of encounters.

    • getEncounterCount

      public int getEncounterCount()
      Get the number of encounters performed by this clinician.
      Returns:
      The number of encounters.

    • incrementProcedures

      public int incrementProcedures()
      Increment the number of procedures performed by this clinician.
      Returns:
      The incremented number of procedures.

    • getProcedureCount

      public int getProcedureCount()
      Get the number of procedures performed by this clinician.
      Returns:
      The number of procedures.

    • getX

      public double getX()
      Get the X coordinate of the clinician's location.
      Specified by:
      getX in interface QuadTreeElement
      Returns:
      The X coordinate.

    • getY

      public double getY()
      Get the Y coordinate of the clinician's location.
      Specified by:
      getY in interface QuadTreeElement
      Returns:
      The Y coordinate.

    • getLonLat

      public Point2D.Double getLonLat()
      Get the clinician's geographic location as a point.
      Returns:
      The location as a Point2D.Double.
